# SSLSessionOption.fallback

**Case**

Enable fallback countermeasures.

## Declaration

```swift
case fallback
```

## Discussion

Use this option when retyring an SSL connection with a lower protocol version because of failure to connect.
title: SSLSessionOption.fallback
